creator: tanerinux@gmail.com
text:
It seems latest nfs related changes (9.0-CURRENT) break Linux nfs client support. Nfs service (Nov,06 cvs) hangs certainly, during mount with linux client. Nfsd daemon going into "D" state, which is not able to KILL. System can't able reboot until doing hard reset. There is no problem with freebsd clients. Problem is reproducible with linux clients.

How-To-Repeat: Doing with a linux client:

mount -t nfs fbsd-server:/exported/dir /mount-point
